ksa_text: Skill in influencing organizational decision-makers and cross-functional stakeholders to adopt data-driven approaches, including framing technical value propositions in business terms, building consensus across competing priorities, and overcoming resistance through evidence rather than authority.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA LS-S-014 (LS, Skill) does not clear the weak fit inclusion threshold of 0.52. Framework signals (ddat=0.463, nist_ai_rmf=0.442, onet=0.404) do not demonstrate sufficient alignment with core analytics/BI work.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 exclude upheld. Score 0.4628 below threshold for weak fit domain; no rescuing analytics text signals. No internal inconsistencies identified.

pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Composite 0.4628 for LS domain does not meet the evidentiary bar for ANL IC-level inclusion per Leadership competencies in IC-to-senior-IC analytics roles are limited to peer influence and technical mentorship, not organizational strategy. pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 exclude upheld. External evidence confirms LS domain KSA at composite 0.4628 is not a standard requirement for Performance Analyst at IC-to-senior-IC level.

decision_rationale: Pipeline consensus: exclude. P2 exclude confirmed by P3 (internal) and P4 (external) adversarial agents. Zero overturns. Composite 0.4628, domain LS, scope weak fit. High confidence.
